typography.fontSans: Soehne, Manrope, Avenir Next, SF Pro Display, sans-serif

gradients.hero: radial-gradient(circle at 15% 5%, rgba(199,139,62,0.42), transparent 48%), radial-gradient(circle at 85% 12%, rgba(77,182,172,0.32), transparent 44%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, rgba(76,120,196,0.24), transparent 58%), linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(7,14,31,1), rgba(10,18,34,1))
